title: soldanella alpina var. pusilla
intro: Soldanella alpina var. pusilla, also known as small alpine dropwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Primulaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Soldanella alpina var. pusilla has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, due to its high content of saponins and other bioactive compounds. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
